title: Dense Croatian Cheese Gratin
description: Earthy, cheese-pull comfort dish featuring shallots baked to a golden crust, keto-friendly and dense.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C and place a cast-iron skillet in the oven to heat.
While oven warms, heat olive oil and butter in a skillet over medium heat until butter melts.
Add sliced shallots and sauté until translucent and fragrant, about 3 minutes.
Stir in smoked paprika and dried oregano, cooking for 30 seconds to release aromas.
Add cubed smoked cheese to skillet, letting it melt slightly, then pour in heavy cream and stir until a uniform sauce forms.
Season the mixture with pinch of salt and black pepper, adjusting to taste.
Carefully remove hot skillet from oven and transfer the cheese mixture back into the oven-safe skillet.
Bake uncovered for 12-15 minutes until the top is golden brown and the gratin is bubbling.
Remove from oven, let rest 5 minutes, then slice and serve immediately.
